NOTIFICATION ‘Now Delhi, the 29th November, 2006 G.S.R, 296.— In exeteise of the powers conferred by clause (0) of sub-section (2) of Section 56 of the Fenty Conservation Act, 2001 (52 of 2001), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Bureau of Fnengy Eificiency (Annual Report) Rules, 2005, namely -— |. Short title and Commencement. — (1) These rules may be called the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Annus! Report) Amendment Rules, 2006, (2) They shall come into ford on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Annual Report) Rules, 2005, in rule 5, after the word “submit” the words iglish and Hindi version af" shall be inserted. (F.No. 10772004-EM) UIN, PANJIAR, Adal.
